findings.description: Jacob (D) Geach was a sibling of Elizabeth Geach — a son of Peter Geach and Rebecca Geach of Licking County, Ohio. He is named as one of six minor heirs (Jacob, Elizabeth, Mary, Thomas, William, and Nancy Geach) in the 1836 Licking County Court of Common Pleas probate petition for the estate of the intestate Peter Geach.
supporting_sources: Licking County, Ohio, Common Pleas probate petition for the estate of Peter Geach (intestate) — names widow Rebecca Geach and minor children Jacob, Elizabeth, Mary, Thomas, William, and Nancy Geach (recoverable via FamilySearch full-text search).
